prompt: 检查需求链完整性: PRD-001 存在，但缺少对应的 System Architecture 章节和 User Story US-001

assertions.name: detects_chain_gap
assertions.description: Should detect the broken PRD→Architecture→Story chain

assertions.name: identifies_missing_story
assertions.description: Should identify missing User Story US-001
assertions.check: output.includes('US-001') || output.includes('User Story') || output.includes('用户故事')
